meaning: <日>n.[宗]开悟(日本佛教禅宗用语)[日文汉字:悟]
examples: "Your lecture is called 'From Satori to Silicon Valley,'" he explained.
Will they? There is no guarantee, but knowing a little history might help. And having some idea of where satori is can't hurt.
I have met academic specialists who insist that Alan Watts, who did so much to popularize Zen, did not grasp the authentic meaning of satori.
The Satori performed perfectly whether I was walking along the shore or climbing onto a glacier.
His favourite piece of tech is his F-Stop Satori EXP, a rucksack he uses when carrying his gear to remote locations.
